ddls:
CREATE TABLE "electrical_data" (
  "data_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each data entry */,
  "timestamp" TEXT /* Timestamp of the measurement */,
  "watts" REAL /* Power usage in Watts */,
  "volts" REAL /* Voltage in Volts */,
  "amps" REAL /* Current in Amps */,
  "power_factor" REAL /* Power factor */,
  "mark" TEXT /* Mark or identifier for the data set */,
  "sensor_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the sensor or meter that collected the data */,
  "location_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the location where the data was collected */,
  "unit_number" TEXT /* Unit number for equipment monitoring */,
  "equipment_id" TEXT /* Equipment identifier (e.g., motor, pump) */,
  "average_watts" REAL /* Average power usage over a defined interval */,
  "average_volts" REAL /* Average voltage over a defined interval */,
  "average_amps" REAL /* Average current over a defined interval */,
  "average_power_factor" REAL /* Average power factor over a defined interval */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("data_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_electrical_data_location_id FOREIGN KEY ("location_id") REFERENCES locations ("location_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_electrical_data_equipment_id FOREIGN KEY ("equipment_id") REFERENCES equipment ("equipment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_electrical_data_sensor_id FOREIGN KEY ("sensor_id") REFERENCES sensors ("sensor_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "sensors" (
  "sensor_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each sensor or meter */,
  "sensor_name" TEXT /* Name of the sensor or meter */,
  "sensor_type" TEXT /* Type of the sensor (e.g., Power Meter, Voltage Sensor) */,
  "installation_date" TEXT /* Date the sensor was installed */,
  "last_calibration_date" TEXT /* Date the sensor was last calibrated */,
  "location_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the location where the sensor is installed */,
  "calibration_interval" TEXT /* Interval at which the sensor needs calibration */,
  "accuracy" REAL /* Accuracy of the sensor measurements */,
  "resolution" REAL /* Resolution of the sensor measurements */,
  "manufacturer" TEXT /* Manufacturer of the sensor */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("sensor_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_sensors_location_id FOREIGN KEY ("location_id") REFERENCES locations ("location_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "locations" (
  "location_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each location */,
  "location_name" TEXT /* Name of the location */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the location */,
  "contact_person" TEXT /* Name of the contact person for the location */,
  "contact_email" TEXT /* Email address of the contact person */,
  "address" TEXT /* Address of the location */,
  "city" TEXT /* City where the location is situated */,
  "state" TEXT /* State where the location is situated */,
  "zip_code" TEXT /* Zip code of the location */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("location_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "alarms" (
  "alarm_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each alarm event */,
  "data_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the data entry that triggered the alarm */,
  "alarm_type" TEXT /* Type of the alarm (e.g., High Power Usage, Low Voltage) */,
  "threshold_value" REAL /* Threshold value that was exceeded */,
  "alert_time" TEXT /* Timestamp when the alarm was triggered */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the alarm (e.g., Active, Resolved) */,
  "resolved_by" TEXT /* Name of the person who resolved the alarm */,
  "resolution_notes" TEXT /* Additional notes regarding the resolution */,
  "priority" TEXT /* Priority of the alarm (e.g., High, Medium, Low) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("alarm_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_alarms_data_id FOREIGN KEY ("data_id") REFERENCES electrical_data ("data_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., Engineer, Maintenance Staff, Admin) */,
  "department" TEXT /* Department the user belongs to */,
  "password" TEXT /* Password for the user */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last login */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the system */,
  "access_time" TEXT /* Timestamp when the system was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., Login, Logout, Data Access) */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address of the user */,
  "access_method" TEXT /* Method used for access (e.g., Web, Mobile App) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "reports" (
  "report_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each report */,
  "report_name" TEXT /* Name of the report */,
  "report_type" TEXT /* Type of the report (e.g., Daily Summary, Monthly Analysis) */,
  "generate_time" TEXT /* Timestamp when the report was generated */,
  "file_path" TEXT /* File path to the report */,
  "generated_by" TEXT /* Name of the user who generated the report */,
  "report_format" TEXT /* Format of the report (e.g., PDF, CSV) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("report_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_reports_generated_by FOREIGN KEY ("generated_by") REFERENCES users ("user_name")
)

CREATE TABLE "maintenance_records" (
  "record_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each maintenance record */,
  "sensor_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the sensor or meter that was maintained */,
  "maintenance_type" TEXT /* Type of maintenance performed (e.g., Calibration, Repair) */,
  "maintenance_date" TEXT /* Date the maintenance was performed */,
  "notes" TEXT /* Notes about the maintenance */,
  "performed_by" TEXT /* Name of the person who performed the maintenance */,
  "cost" REAL /* Cost incurred for the maintenance */,
  "time_spent" REAL /* Time spent on the maintenance */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("record_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_maintenance_records_performed_by FOREIGN KEY ("performed_by") REFERENCES users ("user_name"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_maintenance_records_sensor_id FOREIGN KEY ("sensor_id") REFERENCES sensors ("sensor_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "thresholds" (
  "threshold_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each threshold */,
  "sensor_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the sensor or meter the threshold applies to */,
  "threshold_type" TEXT /* Type of the threshold (e.g., High Power Usage, Low Voltage) */,
  "value" REAL /* Value of the threshold */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the threshold */,
  "alert_level" TEXT /* Level of the alert (e.g., Warning, Critical) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("threshold_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_thresholds_sensor_id FOREIGN KEY ("sensor_id") REFERENCES sensors ("sensor_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "equipment" (
  "equipment_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each equipment */,
  "equipment_name" TEXT /* Name of the equipment */,
  "equipment_type" TEXT /* Type of the equipment (e.g., Motor, Pump) */,
  "installation_date" TEXT /* Date the equipment was installed */,
  "last_maintenance_date" TEXT /* Date the equipment was last maintained */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("equipment_id")
)
